title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node.js and browsers (fetch-based).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat or embeddings endpoints.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI with readline history, markdown rendering and streaming.

title: ollama-copilot (jmorganca/ollama-copilot)
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin for VS Code backed by Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Spring Boot starters included).

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama: simple DSL to chat, generate and pull models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by the community: use Ollama models as generators or embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Official recipes: FastAPI backend, Next.js chat, Rust plugin, GPU Dockerfiles, etc.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama replies into threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to integrate local LLMs into no-code workflows.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that answers questions using Ollama with per-channel model selection.

title: ollama-obsidian-plugin
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin written in Lua: chat, generate and refactor with Ollama inside the editor.

title: ollama-on-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example to scale Ollama models across GPU workers.

title: ollama-grpc-bridge
summary: Lightweight gRPC bridge exposing Ollama REST API over gRPC for high-performance clients.
